CustomField.description: Staging field for external systems to pass Campaign auto-number text (e.g., CMP-00042). Before-insert trigger resolves this to the actual Campaign record Id and sets Campaign__c. External systems should map to this field instead of Campaign__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the Campaign ID (e.g., CMP-00042). System will automatically link the Campaign.
CustomField.label: Campaign ID Text
